description.value:
You spew information about a topic you're passionate about that no one asked for. Choose a creature within 30 feet of you that you're aware of. Attempt a Lore check against that target's Will DC. Regardless of your result, the creature is temporarily immune to your attempts to Knowledge Bomb it for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.
